revision.comment: shorter labels without links are fine
revision.text:
{{Infobox | bodyclass = infobox-user-script | bodystyle = {{#ifeq: {{{styled|}}} | yes | border: 2px ridge #CAE1FF; width: 30em; padding-bottom: 0px; | }} {{{bodystyle|}}} | title = {{#if:{{{mainsource|}}}|}}{{#ifeq: {{{styled|}}} | yes | [[Wikipedia:User scripts|User script]] | {{{name|{{SUBPAGENAME}}}}} }}{{#if:{{{mainsource|}}}|}} | above = {{#ifeq: {{{styled|}}} | yes | {{{name|{{SUBPAGENAME}}}}} | }} | titlestyle = {{#ifeq: {{{styled|}}} | yes | font-size: 0.95em; padding: 0px; margin: 0px | }} | abovestyle = {{#ifeq: {{{styled|}}} | yes | background:#83C5DA; padding: 3px 0px | }} | labelstyle = {{#ifeq: {{{styled|}}} | yes | background:#DFEFFF; padding: 0px 7px; vertical-align: middle | }} | datastyle = {{#ifeq: {{{styled|}}} | yes | padding: 5px 5px; | }} | image = {{#invoke:InfoboxImage|InfoboxImage|image={{{logo|}}}|size={{{logosize|}}}|upright={{{logoupright|}}}|alt={{{logoalt|}}}}} | caption = {{{logo-caption|}}} | image2 = {{#invoke:InfoboxImage|InfoboxImage|image={{{screenshot|}}}|size={{{screenshotsize|}}}|upright={{{screenshotupright|}}}|alt={{{screenshotalt|}}}}} | caption2 = {{{screenshot-caption|}}} | label1 = Description | data1 = {{{desc|}}} | label2 = Author(s) | data2 = {{{author|}}} | label3 = Maintainer(s) | data3 = {{{maintainer|}}} | label4 = Status | data4 = {{{status|}}} | label5 = First released | data5 = {{{released|}}} | label6 = Version | data6 = {{{version|}}} | label7 = Updated | data7 = {{{updated|{{#time:F j, Y|{{REVISIONTIMESTAMP:{{{mainsource|{{Linkless exists|{{FULLPAGENAME}}.js|{{FULLPAGENAME}}.js|{{Linkless exists|{{FULLPAGENAME}}.css|{{FULLPAGENAME}}.css|{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}}}}}}}}}}
    ({{Time ago|{{#time:H:i j F Y|{{REVISIONTIMESTAMP:{{{mainsource|{{Linkless exists|{{FULLPAGENAME}}.js|{{FULLPAGENAME}}.js|{{Linkless exists|{{FULLPAGENAME}}.css|{{FULLPAGENAME}}.css|{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}}}}}}}}}}|min_magnitude=days}})}}} | label8 = Browsers | data8 = {{{browsers|}}} | label9 = Skins | data9 = {{{skins|}}} | label10 = Source{{#if:{{{beta|}}}|
Beta}} | data10 = {{{source| {{#if:{{{mainsource|}}}| [[{{{mainsource|}}}]] | [[{{Linkless exists|{{FULLPAGENAME}}.js|{{FULLPAGENAME}}.js|{{Linkless exists|{{FULLPAGENAME}}.css|{{FULLPAGENAME}}.css|{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}}}]] }} }}}{{#if:{{{beta|}}}|
{{{beta}}}}} | label11 = [[GitHub]] repository | data11 = {{#ifeq:{{{github|}}}|||{{GitHub|{{{github}}}|link=hidden}}}} }}{{#switch:{{{categorize|{{{cat|}}}}}}|never|no=|{{#switch:{{NAMESPACENUMBER}}|2|4=[[Category:Wikipedia scripts|{{SUBPAGENAME}}]]}} }}{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{main other|}}|preview=Page using [[Template:Infobox Wikipedia user script]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_" | styled | bodystyle | install-target | name | logo | logosize | logoupright | logoalt | logo-caption | screenshot | screenshotsize | screenshotupright | screenshotalt | screenshot-caption | desc | author | maintainer | status | released | version | updated | browsers | skins | source | mainsource | beta | GitHub | github | categorize | cat }} {{documentation}}

{{Infobox | bodyclass = infobox-user-script | bodystyle = {{#ifeq: {{{styled|}}} | yes | border: 2px ridge #CAE1FF; width: 30em; padding-bottom: 0px; | }} {{{bodystyle|}}} | title = {{#if:{{{mainsource|}}}|}}{{#ifeq: {{{styled|}}} | yes | [[Wikipedia:User scripts|User script]] | {{{name|{{SUBPAGENAME}}}}} }}{{#if:{{{mainsource|}}}|}} | above = {{#ifeq: {{{styled|}}} | yes | {{{name|{{SUBPAGENAME}}}}} | }} | titlestyle = {{#ifeq: {{{styled|}}} | yes | font-size: 0.95em; padding: 0px; margin: 0px | }} | abovestyle = {{#ifeq: {{{styled|}}} | yes | background:#83C5DA; padding: 3px 0px | }} | labelstyle = {{#ifeq: {{{styled|}}} | yes | background:#DFEFFF; padding: 0px 7px; vertical-align: middle | }} | datastyle = {{#ifeq: {{{styled|}}} | yes | padding: 5px 5px; | }} | image = {{#invoke:InfoboxImage|InfoboxImage|image={{{logo|}}}|size={{{logosize|}}}|upright={{{logoupright|}}}|alt={{{logoalt|}}}}} | caption = {{{logo-caption|}}} | image2 = {{#invoke:InfoboxImage|InfoboxImage|image={{{screenshot|}}}|size={{{screenshotsize|}}}|upright={{{screenshotupright|}}}|alt={{{screenshotalt|}}}}} | caption2 = {{{screenshot-caption|}}} | label1 = Description | data1 = {{{desc|}}} | label2 = Author(s) | data2 = {{{author|}}} | label3 = Maintainer(s) | data3 = {{{maintainer|}}} | label4 = Status | data4 = {{{status|}}} | label5 = First released | data5 = {{{released|}}} | label6 = Version | data6 = {{{version|}}} | label7 = Updated | data7 = {{{updated|{{#time:F j, Y|{{REVISIONTIMESTAMP:{{{mainsource|{{Linkless exists|{{FULLPAGENAME}}.js|{{FULLPAGENAME}}.js|{{Linkless exists|{{FULLPAGENAME}}.css|{{FULLPAGENAME}}.css|{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}}}}}}}}}}
    ({{Time ago|{{#time:H:i j F Y|{{REVISIONTIMESTAMP:{{{mainsource|{{Linkless exists|{{FULLPAGENAME}}.js|{{FULLPAGENAME}}.js|{{Linkless exists|{{FULLPAGENAME}}.css|{{FULLPAGENAME}}.css|{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}}}}}}}}}}|min_magnitude=days}})}}} | label8 = Browsers | data8 = {{{browsers|}}} | label9 = Skins | data9 = {{{skins|}}} | label10 = Source{{#if:{{{beta|}}}|
Beta}} | data10 = {{{source| {{#if:{{{mainsource|}}}| [[{{{mainsource|}}}]] | [[{{Linkless exists|{{FULLPAGENAME}}.js|{{FULLPAGENAME}}.js|{{Linkless exists|{{FULLPAGENAME}}.css|{{FULLPAGENAME}}.css|{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}}}]] }} }}}{{#if:{{{beta|}}}|
{{{beta}}}}} | label11 = [[GitHub]] repository | data11 = {{#ifeq:{{{github|}}}|||{{GitHub|{{{github}}}|link=hidden}}}} }}{{#switch:{{{categorize|{{{cat|}}}}}}|never|no=|{{#switch:{{NAMESPACENUMBER}}|2|4=[[Category:Wikipedia scripts|{{SUBPAGENAME}}]]}} }}{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{main other|}}|preview=Page using [[Template:Infobox Wikipedia user script]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_" | styled | bodystyle | install-target | name | logo | logosize | logoupright | logoalt | logo-caption | screenshot | screenshotsize | screenshotupright | screenshotalt | screenshot-caption | desc | author | maintainer | status | released | version | updated | browsers | skins | source | mainsource | beta | GitHub | github | categorize | cat }} {{documentation}}

{{Infobox | bodyclass = infobox-user-script | bodystyle = {{#ifeq: {{{styled|}}} | yes | border: 2px ridge #CAE1FF; width: 30em; padding-bottom: 0px; | }} {{{bodystyle|}}} | title = {{#if:{{{mainsource|}}}|}}{{#ifeq: {{{styled|}}} | yes | [[Wikipedia:User scripts|User script]] | {{{name|{{SUBPAGENAME}}}}} }}{{#if:{{{mainsource|}}}|}} | above = {{#ifeq: {{{styled|}}} | yes | {{{name|{{SUBPAGENAME}}}}} | }} | titlestyle = {{#ifeq: {{{styled|}}} | yes | font-size: 0.95em; padding: 0px; margin: 0px | }} | abovestyle = {{#ifeq: {{{styled|}}} | yes | background:#83C5DA; padding: 3px 0px | }} | labelstyle = {{#ifeq: {{{styled|}}} | yes | background:#DFEFFF; padding: 0px 7px; vertical-align: middle | }} | datastyle = {{#ifeq: {{{styled|}}} | yes | padding: 5px 5px; | }} | image = {{#invoke:InfoboxImage|InfoboxImage|image={{{logo|}}}|size={{{logosize|}}}|upright={{{logoupright|}}}|alt={{{logoalt|}}}}} | caption = {{{logo-caption|}}} | image2 = {{#invoke:InfoboxImage|InfoboxImage|image={{{screenshot|}}}|size={{{screenshotsize|}}}|upright={{{screenshotupright|}}}|alt={{{screenshotalt|}}}}} | caption2 = {{{screenshot-caption|}}} | label1 = Description | data1 = {{{desc|}}} | label2 = Author(s) | data2 = {{{author|}}} | label3 = Maintainer(s) | data3 = {{{maintainer|}}} | label4 = Status | data4 = {{{status|}}} | label5 = First released | data5 = {{{released|}}} | label6 = Version | data6 = {{{version|}}} | label7 = Updated | data7 = {{{updated|{{#time:F j, Y|{{REVISIONTIMESTAMP:{{{mainsource|{{Linkless exists|{{FULLPAGENAME}}.js|{{FULLPAGENAME}}.js|{{Linkless exists|{{FULLPAGENAME}}.css|{{FULLPAGENAME}}.css|{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}}}}}}}}}}
    ({{Time ago|{{#time:H:i j F Y|{{REVISIONTIMESTAMP:{{{mainsource|{{Linkless exists|{{FULLPAGENAME}}.js|{{FULLPAGENAME}}.js|{{Linkless exists|{{FULLPAGENAME}}.css|{{FULLPAGENAME}}.css|{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}}}}}}}}}}|min_magnitude=days}})}}} | label8 = Browsers | data8 = {{{browsers|}}} | label9 = Skins | data9 = {{{skins|}}} | label10 = Source{{#if:{{{beta|}}}|
Beta}} | data10 = {{{source| {{#if:{{{mainsource|}}}| [[{{{mainsource|}}}]] | [[{{Linkless exists|{{FULLPAGENAME}}.js|{{FULLPAGENAME}}.js|{{Linkless exists|{{FULLPAGENAME}}.css|{{FULLPAGENAME}}.css|{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}}}]] }} }}}{{#if:{{{beta|}}}|
{{{beta}}}}} | label11 = [[GitHub]] repository | data11 = {{#ifeq:{{{github|}}}|||{{GitHub|{{{github}}}|link=hidden}}}} }}{{#switch:{{{categorize|{{{cat|}}}}}}|never|no=|{{#switch:{{NAMESPACENUMBER}}|2|4=[[Category:Wikipedia scripts|{{SUBPAGENAME}}]] [[Category:bump 1-20]] }} }}{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{main other|}}|preview=Page using [[Template:Infobox Wikipedia user script]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_" | styled | bodystyle | install-target | name | logo | logosize | logoupright | logoalt | logo-caption | screenshot | screenshotsize | screenshotupright | screenshotalt | screenshot-caption | desc | author | maintainer | status | released | version | updated | browsers | skins | source | mainsource | beta | GitHub | github | categorize | cat }} {{documentation}}

{{Infobox | bodyclass = infobox-user-script | bodystyle = {{#ifeq: {{{styled|}}} | yes | border: 2px ridge #CAE1FF; width: 30em; padding-bottom: 0px; | }} {{{bodystyle|}}} | title = {{#if:{{{mainsource|}}}|}}{{#ifeq: {{{styled|}}} | yes | [[Wikipedia:User scripts|User script]] | {{{name|{{SUBPAGENAME}}}}} }}{{#if:{{{mainsource|}}}|}} | above = {{#ifeq: {{{styled|}}} | yes | {{{name|{{SUBPAGENAME}}}}} | }} | titlestyle = {{#ifeq: {{{styled|}}} | yes | font-size: 0.95em; padding: 0px; margin: 0px | }} | abovestyle = {{#ifeq: {{{styled|}}} | yes | background:#83C5DA; padding: 3px 0px | }} | labelstyle = {{#ifeq: {{{styled|}}} | yes | background:#DFEFFF; padding: 0px 7px; vertical-align: middle | }} | datastyle = {{#ifeq: {{{styled|}}} | yes | padding: 5px 5px; | }} | image = {{#invoke:InfoboxImage|InfoboxImage|image={{{logo|}}}|size={{{logosize|}}}|upright={{{logoupright|}}}|alt={{{logoalt|}}}}} | caption = {{{logo-caption|}}} | image2 = {{#invoke:InfoboxImage|InfoboxImage|image={{{screenshot|}}}|size={{{screenshotsize|}}}|upright={{{screenshotupright|}}}|alt={{{screenshotalt|}}}}} | caption2 = {{{screenshot-caption|}}} | label1 = Description | data1 = {{{desc|}}} | label2 = Author(s) | data2 = {{{author|}}} | label3 = Maintainer(s) | data3 = {{{maintainer|}}} | label4 = Status | data4 = {{{status|}}} | label5 = First released | data5 = {{{released|}}} | label6 = Version | data6 = {{{version|}}} | label7 = Updated | data7 = {{{updated|{{#time:F j, Y|{{REVISIONTIMESTAMP:{{{mainsource|{{Linkless exists|{{FULLPAGENAME}}.js|{{FULLPAGENAME}}.js|{{Linkless exists|{{FULLPAGENAME}}.css|{{FULLPAGENAME}}.css|{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}}}}}}}}}}
    ({{Time ago|{{#time:H:i j F Y|{{REVISIONTIMESTAMP:{{{mainsource|{{Linkless exists|{{FULLPAGENAME}}.js|{{FULLPAGENAME}}.js|{{Linkless exists|{{FULLPAGENAME}}.css|{{FULLPAGENAME}}.css|{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}}}}}}}}}}|min_magnitude=days}})}}} | label8 = Browsers | data8 = {{{browsers|}}} | label9 = Skins | data9 = {{{skins|}}} | label10 = Source{{#if:{{{beta|}}}|
Beta}} | data10 = {{{source| {{#if:{{{mainsource|}}}| [[{{{mainsource|}}}]] | [[{{Linkless exists|{{FULLPAGENAME}}.js|{{FULLPAGENAME}}.js|{{Linkless exists|{{FULLPAGENAME}}.css|{{FULLPAGENAME}}.css|{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}}}]] }} }}}{{#if:{{{beta|}}}|
{{{beta}}}}} | label11 = [[GitHub]] repository | data11 = {{#ifeq:{{{github|}}}|||{{GitHub|{{{github}}}|link=hidden}}}} }}{{#switch:{{{categorize|{{{cat|}}}}}}|never|no=|{{#switch:{{NAMESPACENUMBER}}|2|4=[[Category:Wikipedia scripts|{{SUBPAGENAME}}]] [[Category:b]] }} }}{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{main other|}}|preview=Page using [[Template:Infobox Wikipedia user script]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_" | styled | bodystyle | install-target | name | logo | logosize | logoupright | logoalt | logo-caption | screenshot | screenshotsize | screenshotupright | screenshotalt | screenshot-caption | desc | author | maintainer | status | released | version | updated | browsers | skins | source | mainsource | beta | GitHub | github | categorize | cat }} {{documentation}}

revision.comment: Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects I]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects I]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude>"
revision.text: #redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects I]]
#redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects I]]
#redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects I]]

{{Infobox | bodyclass = infobox-user-script | bodystyle = {{#ifeq: {{{styled|}}} | yes | border: 2px ridge #CAE1FF; width: 30em; padding-bottom: 0px; | }} {{{bodystyle|}}} | title = {{#if:{{{mainsource|}}}|}}{{#ifeq: {{{styled|}}} | yes | [[Wikipedia:User scripts|User script]] | {{{name|{{SUBPAGENAME}}}}} }}{{#if:{{{mainsource|}}}|}} | above = {{#ifeq: {{{styled|}}} | yes | {{{name|{{SUBPAGENAME}}}}} | }} | titlestyle = {{#ifeq: {{{styled|}}} | yes | font-size: 0.95em; padding: 0px; margin: 0px | }} | abovestyle = {{#ifeq: {{{styled|}}} | yes | background:#83C5DA; padding: 3px 0px | }} | labelstyle = {{#ifeq: {{{styled|}}} | yes | background:#DFEFFF; padding: 0px 7px; vertical-align: middle | }} | datastyle = {{#ifeq: {{{styled|}}} | yes | padding: 5px 5px; | }} | image = {{#invoke:InfoboxImage|InfoboxImage|image={{{logo|}}}|size={{{logosize|}}}|upright={{{logoupright|}}}|alt={{{logoalt|}}}}} | caption = {{{logo-caption|}}} | image2 = {{#invoke:InfoboxImage|InfoboxImage|image={{{screenshot|}}}|size={{{screenshotsize|}}}|upright={{{screenshotupright|}}}|alt={{{screenshotalt|}}}}} | caption2 = {{{screenshot-caption|}}} | label1 = Description | data1 = {{{desc|}}} | label2 = Author(s) | data2 = {{{author|}}} | label3 = Maintainer(s) | data3 = {{{maintainer|}}} | label4 = Status | data4 = {{{status|}}} | label5 = First released | data5 = {{{released|}}} | label6 = Version | data6 = {{{version|}}} | label7 = Updated | data7 = {{{updated|{{#time:F j, Y|{{REVISIONTIMESTAMP:{{{mainsource|{{Linkless exists|{{FULLPAGENAME}}.js|{{FULLPAGENAME}}.js|{{Linkless exists|{{FULLPAGENAME}}.css|{{FULLPAGENAME}}.css|{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}}}}}}}}}}
    ({{Time ago|{{#time:H:i j F Y|{{REVISIONTIMESTAMP:{{{mainsource|{{Linkless exists|{{FULLPAGENAME}}.js|{{FULLPAGENAME}}.js|{{Linkless exists|{{FULLPAGENAME}}.css|{{FULLPAGENAME}}.css|{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}}}}}}}}}}|min_magnitude=days}})}}} | label8 = Browsers | data8 = {{{browsers|}}} | label9 = Skins | data9 = {{{skins|}}} | label10 = Source{{#if:{{{beta|}}}|
Beta}} | data10 = {{{source| {{#if:{{{mainsource|}}}| [[{{{mainsource|}}}]] | [[{{Linkless exists|{{FULLPAGENAME}}.js|{{FULLPAGENAME}}.js|{{Linkless exists|{{FULLPAGENAME}}.css|{{FULLPAGENAME}}.css|{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}}}]] }} }}}{{#if:{{{beta|}}}|
{{{beta}}}}} | label11 = [[GitHub]] repository | data11 = {{#ifeq:{{{github|}}}|||{{GitHub|{{{github}}}|link=hidden}}}} }}{{#switch:{{{categorize|{{{cat|}}}}}}|never|no=|{{#switch:{{NAMESPACENUMBER}}|2|4=[[Category:Wikipedia scripts|{{SUBPAGENAME}}]] [[Category:b]] }} }}{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{main other|}}|preview=Page using [[Template:Infobox Wikipedia user script]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_" | styled | bodystyle | install-target | name | logo | logosize | logoupright | logoalt | logo-caption | screenshot | screenshotsize | screenshotupright | screenshotalt | screenshot-caption | desc | author | maintainer | status | released | version | updated | browsers | skins | source | mainsource | beta | GitHub | github | categorize | cat }} {{documentation}}

revision.comment: Bot: convert local/ILL link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text:
{{Infobox | bodyclass = infobox-user-script | bodystyle = {{#ifeq: {{{styled|}}} | yes | border: 2px ridge #CAE1FF; width: 30em; padding-bottom: 0px; | }} {{{bodystyle|}}} | title = {{#if:{{{mainsource|}}}|}}{{#ifeq: {{{styled|}}} | yes | [[Wikipedia:User scripts|User script]] | {{{name|{{SUBPAGENAME}}}}} }}{{#if:{{{mainsource|}}}|}} | above = {{#ifeq: {{{styled|}}} | yes | {{{name|{{SUBPAGENAME}}}}} | }} | titlestyle = {{#ifeq: {{{styled|}}} | yes | font-size: 0.95em; padding: 0px; margin: 0px | }} | abovestyle = {{#ifeq: {{{styled|}}} | yes | background:#83C5DA; padding: 3px 0px | }} | labelstyle = {{#ifeq: {{{styled|}}} | yes | background:#DFEFFF; padding: 0px 7px; vertical-align: middle | }} | datastyle = {{#ifeq: {{{styled|}}} | yes | padding: 5px 5px; | }} | image = {{#invoke:InfoboxImage|InfoboxImage|image={{{logo|}}}|size={{{logosize|}}}|upright={{{logoupright|}}}|alt={{{logoalt|}}}}} | caption = {{{logo-caption|}}} | image2 = {{#invoke:InfoboxImage|InfoboxImage|image={{{screenshot|}}}|size={{{screenshotsize|}}}|upright={{{screenshotupright|}}}|alt={{{screenshotalt|}}}}} | caption2 = {{{screenshot-caption|}}} | label1 = Description | data1 = {{{desc|}}} | label2 = Author(s) | data2 = {{{author|}}} | label3 = Maintainer(s) | data3 = {{{maintainer|}}} | label4 = Status | data4 = {{{status|}}} | label5 = First released | data5 = {{{released|}}} | label6 = Version | data6 = {{{version|}}} | label7 = Updated | data7 = {{{updated|{{#time:F j, Y|{{REVISIONTIMESTAMP:{{{mainsource|{{Linkless exists|{{FULLPAGENAME}}.js|{{FULLPAGENAME}}.js|{{Linkless exists|{{FULLPAGENAME}}.css|{{FULLPAGENAME}}.css|{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}}}}}}}}}}
    ({{Time ago|{{#time:H:i j F Y|{{REVISIONTIMESTAMP:{{{mainsource|{{Linkless exists|{{FULLPAGENAME}}.js|{{FULLPAGENAME}}.js|{{Linkless exists|{{FULLPAGENAME}}.css|{{FULLPAGENAME}}.css|{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}}}}}}}}}}|min_magnitude=days}})}}} | label8 = Browsers | data8 = {{{browsers|}}} | label9 = Skins | data9 = {{{skins|}}} | label10 = Source{{#if:{{{beta|}}}|
Beta}} | data10 = {{{source| {{#if:{{{mainsource|}}}| [[{{{mainsource|}}}]] | [[{{Linkless exists|{{FULLPAGENAME}}.js|{{FULLPAGENAME}}.js|{{Linkless exists|{{FULLPAGENAME}}.css|{{FULLPAGENAME}}.css|{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}}}]] }} }}}{{#if:{{{beta|}}}|
{{{beta}}}}} | label11 = [[:en:GitHub|GitHub]] repository | data11 = {{#ifeq:{{{github|}}}|||{{GitHub|{{{github}}}|link=hidden}}}} }}{{#switch:{{{categorize|{{{cat|}}}}}}|never|no=|{{#switch:{{NAMESPACENUMBER}}|2|4=[[Category:Wikipedia scripts|{{SUBPAGENAME}}]] [[Category:b]] }} }}{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{main other|}}|preview=Page using [[Template:Infobox Wikipedia user script]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_" | styled | bodystyle | install-target | name | logo | logosize | logoupright | logoalt | logo-caption | screenshot | screenshotsize | screenshotupright | screenshotalt | screenshot-caption | desc | author | maintainer | status | released | version | updated | browsers | skins | source | mainsource | beta | GitHub | github | categorize | cat }} {{documentation}}

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
{{Infobox | bodyclass = infobox-user-script | bodystyle = {{#ifeq: {{{styled|}}} | yes | border: 2px ridge #CAE1FF; width: 30em; padding-bottom: 0px; | }} {{{bodystyle|}}} | title = {{#if:{{{mainsource|}}}|}}{{#ifeq: {{{styled|}}} | yes | [[Wikipedia:User scripts|User script]] | {{{name|{{SUBPAGENAME}}}}} }}{{#if:{{{mainsource|}}}|}} | above = {{#ifeq: {{{styled|}}} | yes | {{{name|{{SUBPAGENAME}}}}} | }} | titlestyle = {{#ifeq: {{{styled|}}} | yes | font-size: 0.95em; padding: 0px; margin: 0px | }} | abovestyle = {{#ifeq: {{{styled|}}} | yes | background:#83C5DA; padding: 3px 0px | }} | labelstyle = {{#ifeq: {{{styled|}}} | yes | background:#DFEFFF; padding: 0px 7px; vertical-align: middle | }} | datastyle = {{#ifeq: {{{styled|}}} | yes | padding: 5px 5px; | }} | image = {{#invoke:InfoboxImage|InfoboxImage|image={{{logo|}}}|size={{{logosize|}}}|upright={{{logoupright|}}}|alt={{{logoalt|}}}}} | caption = {{{logo-caption|}}} | image2 = {{#invoke:InfoboxImage|InfoboxImage|image={{{screenshot|}}}|size={{{screenshotsize|}}}|upright={{{screenshotupright|}}}|alt={{{screenshotalt|}}}}} | caption2 = {{{screenshot-caption|}}} | label1 = Description | data1 = {{{desc|}}} | label2 = Author(s) | data2 = {{{author|}}} | label3 = Maintainer(s) | data3 = {{{maintainer|}}} | label4 = Status | data4 = {{{status|}}} | label5 = First released | data5 = {{{released|}}} | label6 = Version | data6 = {{{version|}}} | label7 = Updated | data7 = {{{updated|{{#time:F j, Y|{{REVISIONTIMESTAMP:{{{mainsource|{{Linkless exists|{{FULLPAGENAME}}.js|{{FULLPAGENAME}}.js|{{Linkless exists|{{FULLPAGENAME}}.css|{{FULLPAGENAME}}.css|{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}}}}}}}}}}
    ({{Time ago|{{#time:H:i j F Y|{{REVISIONTIMESTAMP:{{{mainsource|{{Linkless exists|{{FULLPAGENAME}}.js|{{FULLPAGENAME}}.js|{{Linkless exists|{{FULLPAGENAME}}.css|{{FULLPAGENAME}}.css|{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}}}}}}}}}}|min_magnitude=days}})}}} | label8 = Browsers | data8 = {{{browsers|}}} | label9 = Skins | data9 = {{{skins|}}} | label10 = Source{{#if:{{{beta|}}}|
Beta}} | data10 = {{{source| {{#if:{{{mainsource|}}}| [[{{{mainsource|}}}]] | [[{{Linkless exists|{{FULLPAGENAME}}.js|{{FULLPAGENAME}}.js|{{Linkless exists|{{FULLPAGENAME}}.css|{{FULLPAGENAME}}.css|{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}}}]] }} }}}{{#if:{{{beta|}}}|
{{{beta}}}}} | label11 = [[:en:GitHub|GitHub]] repository | data11 = {{#ifeq:{{{github|}}}|||{{GitHub|{{{github}}}|link=hidden}}}} }}{{#switch:{{{categorize|{{{cat|}}}}}}|never|no=|{{#switch:{{NAMESPACENUMBER}}|2|4=[[Category:Wikipedia scripts|{{SUBPAGENAME}}]] [[Category:b]] }} }}{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{main other|}}|preview=Page using [[Template:Infobox Wikipedia user script]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_" | styled | bodystyle | install-target | name | logo | logosize | logoupright | logoalt | logo-caption | screenshot | screenshotsize | screenshotupright | screenshotalt | screenshot-caption | desc | author | maintainer | status | released | version | updated | browsers | skins | source | mainsource | beta | GitHub | github | categorize | cat }} {{documentation}} [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
{{Infobox | bodyclass = infobox-user-script | bodystyle = {{#ifeq: {{{styled|}}} | yes | border: 2px ridge #CAE1FF; width: 30em; padding-bottom: 0px; | }} {{{bodystyle|}}} | title = {{#if:{{{mainsource|}}}|}}{{#ifeq: {{{styled|}}} | yes | [[Wikipedia:User scripts|User script]] | {{{name|{{SUBPAGENAME}}}}} }}{{#if:{{{mainsource|}}}|}} | above = {{#ifeq: {{{styled|}}} | yes | {{{name|{{SUBPAGENAME}}}}} | }} | titlestyle = {{#ifeq: {{{styled|}}} | yes | font-size: 0.95em; padding: 0px; margin: 0px | }} | abovestyle = {{#ifeq: {{{styled|}}} | yes | background:#83C5DA; padding: 3px 0px | }} | labelstyle = {{#ifeq: {{{styled|}}} | yes | background:#DFEFFF; padding: 0px 7px; vertical-align: middle | }} | datastyle = {{#ifeq: {{{styled|}}} | yes | padding: 5px 5px; | }} | image = {{#invoke:InfoboxImage|InfoboxImage|image={{{logo|}}}|size={{{logosize|}}}|upright={{{logoupright|}}}|alt={{{logoalt|}}}}} | caption = {{{logo-caption|}}} | image2 = {{#invoke:InfoboxImage|InfoboxImage|image={{{screenshot|}}}|size={{{screenshotsize|}}}|upright={{{screenshotupright|}}}|alt={{{screenshotalt|}}}}} | caption2 = {{{screenshot-caption|}}} | label1 = Description | data1 = {{{desc|}}} | label2 = Author(s) | data2 = {{{author|}}} | label3 = Maintainer(s) | data3 = {{{maintainer|}}} | label4 = Status | data4 = {{{status|}}} | label5 = First released | data5 = {{{released|}}} | label6 = Version | data6 = {{{version|}}} | label7 = Updated | data7 = {{{updated|{{#time:F j, Y|{{REVISIONTIMESTAMP:{{{mainsource|{{Linkless exists|{{FULLPAGENAME}}.js|{{FULLPAGENAME}}.js|{{Linkless exists|{{FULLPAGENAME}}.css|{{FULLPAGENAME}}.css|{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}}}}}}}}}}
    ({{Time ago|{{#time:H:i j F Y|{{REVISIONTIMESTAMP:{{{mainsource|{{Linkless exists|{{FULLPAGENAME}}.js|{{FULLPAGENAME}}.js|{{Linkless exists|{{FULLPAGENAME}}.css|{{FULLPAGENAME}}.css|{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}}}}}}}}}}|min_magnitude=days}})}}} | label8 = Browsers | data8 = {{{browsers|}}} | label9 = Skins | data9 = {{{skins|}}} | label10 = Source{{#if:{{{beta|}}}|
Beta}} | data10 = {{{source| {{#if:{{{mainsource|}}}| [[{{{mainsource|}}}]] | [[{{Linkless exists|{{FULLPAGENAME}}.js|{{FULLPAGENAME}}.js|{{Linkless exists|{{FULLPAGENAME}}.css|{{FULLPAGENAME}}.css|{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}}}]] }} }}}{{#if:{{{beta|}}}|
{{{beta}}}}} | label11 = [[:en:GitHub|GitHub]] repository | data11 = {{#ifeq:{{{github|}}}|||{{GitHub|{{{github}}}|link=hidden}}}} }}{{#switch:{{{categorize|{{{cat|}}}}}}|never|no=|{{#switch:{{NAMESPACENUMBER}}|2|4=[[Category:Wikipedia scripts|{{SUBPAGENAME}}]] [[Category:b]] }} }}{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{main other|}}|preview=Page using [[Template:Infobox Wikipedia user script]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_" | styled | bodystyle | install-target | name | logo | logosize | logoupright | logoalt | logo-caption | screenshot | screenshotsize | screenshotupright | screenshotalt | screenshot-caption | desc | author | maintainer | status | released | version | updated | browsers | skins | source | mainsource | beta | GitHub | github | categorize | cat }} {{documentation}}

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
{{Infobox | bodyclass = infobox-user-script | bodystyle = {{#ifeq: {{{styled|}}} | yes | border: 2px ridge #CAE1FF; width: 30em; padding-bottom: 0px; | }} {{{bodystyle|}}} | title = {{#if:{{{mainsource|}}}|}}{{#ifeq: {{{styled|}}} | yes | [[Wikipedia:User scripts|User script]] | {{{name|{{SUBPAGENAME}}}}} }}{{#if:{{{mainsource|}}}|}} | above = {{#ifeq: {{{styled|}}} | yes | {{{name|{{SUBPAGENAME}}}}} | }} | titlestyle = {{#ifeq: {{{styled|}}} | yes | font-size: 0.95em; padding: 0px; margin: 0px | }} | abovestyle = {{#ifeq: {{{styled|}}} | yes | background:#83C5DA; padding: 3px 0px | }} | labelstyle = {{#ifeq: {{{styled|}}} | yes | background:#DFEFFF; padding: 0px 7px; vertical-align: middle | }} | datastyle = {{#ifeq: {{{styled|}}} | yes | padding: 5px 5px; | }} | image = {{#invoke:InfoboxImage|InfoboxImage|image={{{logo|}}}|size={{{logosize|}}}|upright={{{logoupright|}}}|alt={{{logoalt|}}}}} | caption = {{{logo-caption|}}} | image2 = {{#invoke:InfoboxImage|InfoboxImage|image={{{screenshot|}}}|size={{{screenshotsize|}}}|upright={{{screenshotupright|}}}|alt={{{screenshotalt|}}}}} | caption2 = {{{screenshot-caption|}}} | label1 = Description | data1 = {{{desc|}}} | label2 = Author(s) | data2 = {{{author|}}} | label3 = Maintainer(s) | data3 = {{{maintainer|}}} | label4 = Status | data4 = {{{status|}}} | label5 = First released | data5 = {{{released|}}} | label6 = Version | data6 = {{{version|}}} | label7 = Updated | data7 = {{{updated|{{#time:F j, Y|{{REVISIONTIMESTAMP:{{{mainsource|{{Linkless exists|{{FULLPAGENAME}}.js|{{FULLPAGENAME}}.js|{{Linkless exists|{{FULLPAGENAME}}.css|{{FULLPAGENAME}}.css|{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}}}}}}}}}}

revision.comment: Show repository domain name by default
revision.text:
{{Infobox | bodyclass = infobox-user-script | bodystyle = {{#if: {{Yesno|{{{styled|}}}}} | border: 2px ridge #CAE1FF; width: 30em; padding-bottom: 0px; | }} {{{bodystyle|}}} | title = {{#if:{{{mainsource|}}}|}}{{#if: {{Yesno|{{{styled|}}}}} | [[Wikipedia:User scripts|User script]] | {{{name|{{SUBPAGENAME}}}}} }}{{#if:{{{mainsource|}}}|}} | above = {{#if: {{Yesno|{{{styled|}}}}} | {{{name|{{SUBPAGENAME}}}}} | }} | titlestyle = {{#if: {{Yesno|{{{styled|}}}}} | font-size: 0.95em; padding: 0px; margin: 0px | }} | abovestyle = {{#if: {{Yesno|{{{styled|}}}}} | background:#83C5DA; color:inherit; padding: 3px 0px | }} | labelstyle = {{#if: {{Yesno|{{{styled|}}}}} | background:#DFEFFF; color:inherit; padding: 0px 7px; vertical-align: middle | }} | datastyle = {{#if: {{Yesno|{{{styled|}}}}} | padding: 5px 5px; | }} | image = {{#invoke:InfoboxImage|InfoboxImage|image={{{logo|}}}|size={{{logosize|}}}|upright={{{logoupright|}}}|alt={{{logoalt|}}}}} | caption = {{{logo-caption|}}} | image2 = {{#invoke:InfoboxImage|InfoboxImage|image={{{screenshot|}}}|size={{{screenshotsize|}}}|upright={{{screenshotupright|}}}|alt={{{screenshotalt|}}}}} | caption2 = {{{screenshot-caption|}}} | label1 = Description | data1 = {{{desc|}}} | label2 = Author{{pluralize from text|{{{author|}}}|plural=s}} | data2 = {{{author|}}} | label3 = Maintainer{{pluralize from text|{{{maintainer|}}}|plural=s}} | data3 = {{{maintainer|}}} | label4 = Status | data4 = {{{status|}}} | label5 = First released | data5 = {{{released|}}} | label6 = Version | data6 = {{{version|}}} | label7 = Updated | data7 = {{{updated|{{#time:F j, Y|{{REVISIONTAMP:{{{mainsource|{{Linkless exists|{{FULLPAGENAME}}.js|{{FULLPAGENAME}}.js|{{Linkless exists|{{FULLPAGENAME}}.css|{{FULLPAGENAME}}.css|{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}}}}}}}}}}

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24938264069|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Infobox | bodyclass = infobox-user-script | bodystyle = {{#if: {{Yesno|{{{styled|}}}}} | border: 2px ridge #CAE1FF; width: 30em; padding-bottom: 0px; | }} {{{bodystyle|}}} | title = {{#if:{{{mainsource|}}}|}}{{#if: {{Yesno|{{{styled|}}}}} | [[Wikipedia:User scripts|User script]] | {{{name|{{SUBPAGENAME}}}}} }}{{#if:{{{mainsource|}}}|}} | above = {{#if: {{Yesno|{{{styled|}}}}} | {{{name|{{SUBPAGENAME}}}}} | }} | titlestyle = {{#if: {{Yesno|{{{styled|}}}}} | font-size: 0.95em; padding: 0px; margin: 0px | }} | abovestyle = {{#if: {{Yesno|{{{styled|}}}}} | background:#83C5DA; color:inherit; padding: 3px 0px | }} | labelstyle = {{#if: {{Yesno|{{{styled|}}}}} | background:#DFEFFF; color:inherit; padding: 0px 7px; vertical-align: middle | }} | datastyle = {{#if: {{Yesno|{{{styled|}}}}} | padding: 5px 5px; | }} | image = {{#invoke:InfoboxImage|InfoboxImage|image={{{logo|}}}|size={{{logosize|}}}|upright={{{logoupright|}}}|alt={{{logoalt|}}}}} | caption = {{{logo-caption|}}} | image2 = {{#invoke:InfoboxImage|InfoboxImage|image={{{screenshot|}}}|size={{{screenshotsize|}}}|upright={{{screenshotupright|}}}|alt={{{screenshotalt|}}}}} | caption2 = {{{screenshot-caption|}}} | label1 = Description | data1 = {{{desc|}}} | label2 = Author{{pluralize from text|{{{author|}}}|plural=s}} | data2 = {{{author|}}} | label3 = Maintainer{{pluralize from text|{{{maintainer|}}}|plural=s}} | data3 = {{{maintainer|}}} | label4 = Status | data4 = {{{status|}}} | label5 = First released | data5 = {{{released|}}} | label6 = Version | data6 = {{{version|}}} | label7 = Updated | data7 = {{{updated|{{#time:F j, Y|{{REVISIONTAMP:{{{mainsource|{{Linkless exists|{{FULLPAGENAME}}.js|{{FULLPAGENAME}}.js|{{Linkless exists|{{FULLPAGENAME}}.css|{{FULLPAGENAME}}.css|{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}}}}}}}}}}
    ({{Time ago|{{#time:H:i j F Y|{{REVISIONTAMP:{{{mainsource|{{Linkless exists|{{FULLPAGENAME}}.js|{{FULLPAGENAME}}.js|{{Linkless exists|{{FULLPAGENAME}}.css|{{FULLPAGENAME}}.css|{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}}}}}}}}}}|min_magnitude=days}})}}} | label8 = Browsers | data8 = {{{browsers|}}} | label9 = Skins | data9 = {{{skins|}}} | label10 = Source{{#if:{{{beta|}}}|
Beta}} | data10 = {{{source| {{#if:{{{mainsource|}}}| [[{{{mainsource|}}}]] | [[{{Linkless exists|{{FULLPAGENAME}}.js|{{FULLPAGENAME}}.js|{{Linkless exists|{{FULLPAGENAME}}.css|{{FULLPAGENAME}}.css|{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}}}]] }} }}}{{#if:{{{beta|}}}|
{{{beta}}}}} | label11 = [[GitHub]] repository | data11 = {{#ifeq:{{{github|}}}|||{{GitHub|{{{github}}}|link=hidden}}}} | label12 = Repository | data12 = {{#if:{{{repository|}}}|[{{{repository}}} {{{repository-name|{{#invoke:String|replace|{{#invoke:URLutil|getHost|{{{repository}}}}}|^www%.|||false}}}}}]}} }}{{#switch:{{{categorize|{{{cat|}}}}}}|never|no=|{{#switch:{{NAMESPACENUMBER}}|2|4=}} }}{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{main other|}}|preview=Page using [[Template:Infobox Wikipedia user script]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_" | styled | bodystyle | install-target | name | logo | logosize | logoupright | logoalt | logo-caption | screenshot | screenshotsize | screenshotupright | screenshotalt | screenshot-caption | desc | author | maintainer | status | released | version | updated | browsers | skins | source | mainsource | beta | GitHub | github | repository | repository-name | categorize | cat }} {{documentation}} [[Category:Wikipedia scripts|{{SUBPAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
